summary: Mixed‑quality short show with no standout moments and an underwhelming jam after drums; recording details are unspecified
review: The concert is described as a brief, solid performance but reviewers note the lack of highlights and criticize the post‑drum jam. No comments were made about the audio source or fidelity, leaving the recording quality unknown.

ai_rating.rationale: Average show rating (4, 5, 3) combined with no information on recording quality yields a modest overall score; reviewers are split between praise for brevity and criticism of the jam.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviews do not mention soundboard, audience mix, clarity, or any technical issues, so recording quality cannot be assessed.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The set is noted as short and solid but lacking memorable peaks; the flow feels routine with a disappointing jam segment.
